initial_draft:
```
<my name> Player BLUE </my name>
<MOVE> 1 / 4 </MOVE> 
<my resources> Dollars: 0 </my resources>
<reason> Player RED is offering 2 dollars. I have nothing to offer, but I need to decide if accepting this offer is worth it. Since I have nothing, accepting means I get 2 dollars, and rejecting means I get 0. It's clearly better to accept. </reason>
<player answer> ACCEPT </player answer>
<message>Accepting your offer. It's the only option available to me. </message>
<newly proposed trade> NONE </newly proposed trade>
```

</critique>
